creator: pautina@kharkiv.net
text:
(In reply to Olivier Cochard from comment #1)
Option RPKI- requires the installation of a caching server RPKI. This functional is used by few.
Also, many people use FRR only for OSPF and other internal routing protocols. We  should not to load the system with unnecessary files and enter users who do not understand why this option is needed.
It's my opinion. You can close the ticket and I will completely agree with you. Thank you for your great work.
